nasb.text: Also you shall purposely pull out for her some grain from the bundles and leave it that she may glean, and do not rebuke her.”

esv.text: And also pull out some from the bundles for her and leave it for her to glean, and do not rebuke her.”

cnv.text: 甚至要故意為她從禾捆中抽些出來，留給她去撿，千萬不可責備她。”

ccb.text: 甚至要从麦捆中抽一些出来让她捡，不要责骂她。”

csbs.text: 你们还要从禾捆中有意为她抽出一些麦穗，留给她捡拾，不可斥责她。”
